transcript: Speaker A (Top): काय करतेस? [What are you doing?] Speaker B (Bottom): I sleeping. Speaker A (Top): “I am sleeping” असं म्हणायचं. आणि थोडं formal म्हणायचं असेल तर “I am getting some sleep” असंही म्हणू शकतेस. [Say "I am sleeping". And if you want to say it a bit formally, you can also say "I am getting some sleep".] Speaker B (Bottom): अरे हो! पण English कसं शिकायचं? [Oh yes! But how to learn English?] Speaker A (Top): माझ्यासोबत दररोज फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस केलीस तर फक्त एका महिन्यात तू confidently English बोलू शकतेस. [If you practice with me for just 15 minutes every day, you can speak English confidently in just one month.] Speaker B (Bottom): पण ते महाग असेल ना? [But that must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (Top): अजिबात नाही. फक्त १ रुपयात तू हा app पूर्ण try करून पाहू शकतेस. १०० लाखांपेक्षा जास्त लोक माझ्यासोबत English शिकत आहेत. [Not at all. You can try this app fully for just 1 rupee. More than 10 million people are learning English with me.] Speaker B (Bottom): Wow! कसं join करायचं? [Wow! How to join?] Speaker A (Top): आत्ताच MySivi app डाऊनलोड कर आणि English शिकायला सुरुवात कर. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: काय करतेस [What are you doing?], I sleeping, “I am sleeping”, some sleep, फक्त 15 मिनिटं [Just 15 minutes], फक्त एका महिन्यात [In just one month], English बोलू [Speak English], फक्त 1 रुपयात [For just 1 rupee], MySivi AI Speak English, Start English Learning -MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, Sivi is now MySivi, Wow, MySivi AI English Spe..., Installing..., Master Spoken Eng, Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MyS fast, कर आणि English [Do and English], शिकायला सुरुवात कर [Start learning]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a woman's English grammar in a split-screen video. She then explains how the MySivi app helps users speak English confidently with just 15 minutes of daily practice. The ad promotes a 1-rupee trial and directs users to download the app.
